products.family_name: ARI Hetra BPW-6 Wireless Mobile Column Lift
products.product_name: BPW-6 Series Wireless Battery Mobile Column Lift System
products.description: Wireless, battery-powered mobile column lift system. 12,000 lbs per column capacity. Available in 2, 4, 6, or 8 column configurations with multiple carriage widths including Medium (32.28"/820mm), XX Wide (48.23"/1225mm), and Adjustable (35.43"/900mm). Fork lengths 15-20 inches.

products.family_name: ARI Hetra LP-6 Line Powered Mobile Column Lift
products.product_name: LP-6 Series Line Powered (3-Phase) Mobile Column Lift System
products.description: Line powered (3-phase) mobile column lift system. 12,000 lbs per column capacity. Available in 2, 4, or 6 column configurations with Medium (32.28"/820mm), XX Wide (48.23"/1225mm), and Adjustable (35.43"/900mm) carriage widths. Fork lengths 15-20 inches.

products.family_name: ARI Hetra BPW-8 Wireless Mobile Column Lift
products.product_name: BPW-8 Series Wireless Battery Mobile Column Lift System
products.description: Wireless, battery-powered mobile column lift system. 15,000 lbs per column capacity. Available in 2, 4, 6, or 8 column configurations with standard (31.5"/800mm) and wide (35.43"/900mm) carriage widths. 20-inch forks.
